chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 156 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2024 Ms. Shabana Leghari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing the case at some length, learned Counsel for applicant does not press this application, and submits that applicant may be put at liberty to file a direct complaint against the accused. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed. However, if petitioner wishes to file a direct complaint, she may do so at her own risk and cost and subject all exceptions, in accordance with law. J U D G E Abdul Basit
